raw: Reserving this pass will provide you with a code that can be used to purchase tickets at a 50% discount. The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below: Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
